message:
🌱 kick-governor: all thresholds/cadences overridable via governor.env

- BUSY_THRESHOLD_ISSUES and all CADENCE_* vars now use $\{VAR:-default\}
  so EnvironmentFile values win over script defaults
- governor.env expanded with all knobs documented and commented
- Supervisor adjusts /etc/supervised-agent/governor.env to tune;
  takes effect on next timer fire — no script edit or service restart

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -37,14 +37,15 @@ EXEMPT_LABEL_REGEX="nightly-tests|LFX|do-not-merge|meta-tracker|auto-qa-tuning-r
 
 # ── Queue depth threshold ───────────────────────────────────────────────────
 # Above this → BUSY mode; at or below → QUIET mode.
-BUSY_THRESHOLD_ISSUES=10
+BUSY_THRESHOLD_ISSUES="${BUSY_THRESHOLD_ISSUES:-10}"
 
 # ── Kick cadences (seconds) ─────────────────────────────────────────────────
-CADENCE_SCANNER_SEC=900           # 15 min — never changes regardless of mode
-CADENCE_REVIEWER_BUSY_SEC=900     # 15 min in busy mode
-CADENCE_REVIEWER_QUIET_SEC=1800   # 30 min in quiet mode
-CADENCE_SLOW_BUSY_SEC=10800       # 3 hours in busy mode  (architect + outreach)
-CADENCE_SLOW_QUIET_SEC=3600       # 1 hour  in quiet mode (architect + outreach)
+# All overridable via /etc/supervised-agent/governor.env — no script edit needed.
+CADENCE_SCANNER_SEC="${CADENCE_SCANNER_SEC:-900}"           # 15 min — never changes regardless of mode
+CADENCE_REVIEWER_BUSY_SEC="${CADENCE_REVIEWER_BUSY_SEC:-900}"     # 15 min in busy mode
+CADENCE_REVIEWER_QUIET_SEC="${CADENCE_REVIEWER_QUIET_SEC:-1800}"   # 30 min in quiet mode
+CADENCE_SLOW_BUSY_SEC="${CADENCE_SLOW_BUSY_SEC:-10800}"       # 3 hours in busy mode  (architect + outreach)
+CADENCE_SLOW_QUIET_SEC="${CADENCE_SLOW_QUIET_SEC:-3600}"       # 1 hour  in quiet mode (architect + outreach)
 
 # ── Paths ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
 STATE_DIR="/var/run/kick-governor"

@@ -1,4 +1,20 @@
-# Governor overrides — sourced by kick-governor.service
+# Governor overrides — sourced by kick-governor.service (EnvironmentFile).
+# Edit this file to tune thresholds and cadences; takes effect on next timer fire.
+# Supervisor adjusts these values directly — no script edit needed.
+
+# ntfy topic for kick notifications
 NTFY_TOPIC=issue-scanner
+
+# Path to the kick script
 KICK_SCRIPT=/usr/local/bin/kick-agents.sh
+
+# Issue queue depth above which BUSY mode activates.
+# Supervisor: raise when backlog is expected-large, lower to speed up agents on light load.
 BUSY_THRESHOLD_ISSUES=10
+
+# Kick cadences in seconds. Uncomment and change to override defaults.
+# CADENCE_SCANNER_SEC=900        # scanner: 15min always (default)
+# CADENCE_REVIEWER_BUSY_SEC=900  # reviewer in busy mode: 15min (default)
+# CADENCE_REVIEWER_QUIET_SEC=1800 # reviewer in quiet mode: 30min (default)
+# CADENCE_SLOW_BUSY_SEC=10800    # architect+outreach in busy mode: 3h (default)
+# CADENCE_SLOW_QUIET_SEC=3600    # architect+outreach in quiet mode: 1h (default)
